title: Resolve Hardens Under Kaido’s Cruel War
description: On pages 1–4, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Marco, Unknown person #2, Big Mom, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4 as The war turns cruel as Ice Oni spreads, Nami refuses to deny Luffy’s dream, Yamato defends Momonosuke, and Kaido’s forces tighten the battle.
scene: The war turns cruel as Ice Oni spreads, Nami refuses to deny Luffy’s dream, Yamato defends Momonosuke, and Kaido’s forces tighten the battle.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I still don't know what role I'll be playing in this war, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I know, even more than they do,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: JUST HOW DANGEROUS YOU CAN BE!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You see, my Phoenix flames are quite UN/QUE-Y01.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Looks like I'll be taking Mama's side now!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're someone I've wanted to kill on different occasions in the past...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Yes. If it wasn't for him....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: THAT IDIOT PEDRO BLEW HIMSEELF UP!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: AND IT WAS I WHO SUFFERED THE CONSEQUENCES!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I know that Pedro's sacrifice is somehow related to this war.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're master neko- mamushi's friend. Marco, is it?

summary: This section advances the Wano - Resolve Under Kaido’s Rule storyline with 36 dialogue beats. The war turns cruel as Ice Oni spreads, Nami refuses to deny Luffy’s dream, Yamato defends Momonosuke, and Kaido’s forces tighten the battle.
